mapper.select:
select traceKind, lx, originBusinessType, billNo, qty, flowTime, warehouseName, departmentName, inHospitalCode, orderStatus, remark from ( select '仓库流水' as traceKind, wf.lx as lx, wf.origin_business_type as originBusinessType, wf.bill_no as billNo, wf.qty as qty, wf.flow_time as flowTime, wf.warehouse_name as warehouseName, wf.department_name as departmentName, wf.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, null as orderStatus, null as remark from gz_wh_flow wf where wf.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and wf.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and ifnull(wf.del_flag, 0) = 0
union all
select '备货出库' as traceKind, 'CK' as lx, '备货出库单' as originBusinessType, gs.shipment_no as billNo, se.qty as qty, coalesce(gs.audit_date, gs.create_time) as flowTime, w.name as warehouseName, d.name as departmentName, se.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, gs.shipment_status as orderStatus, case when gs.shipment_status = 2 then '已审核' else '未审核' end as remark from gz_shipment_entry se inner join gz_shipment gs on gs.id = se.paren_id and gs.del_flag != 1 left join fd_warehouse w on gs.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on gs.department_id = d.id where se.del_flag != 1 and gs.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and se.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode}
union all
select '备货退货' as traceKind, 'TH' as lx, '备货退货给供应商' as originBusinessType, rg.goods_no as billNo, rge.qty as qty, coalesce(rg.audit_date, rg.create_time) as flowTime, w.name as warehouseName, d.name as departmentName, rge.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, rg.goods_status as orderStatus, case when rg.goods_status = 2 then '已审核' else '未审核' end as remark from gz_refund_goods_entry rge inner join gz_refund_goods rg on rg.id = rge.paren_id and rg.del_flag != 1 left join fd_warehouse w on rg.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on rg.department_id = d.id where rge.del_flag != 1 and rg.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and rge.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and rg.goods_no like 'GZTH%'
union all
select '科室库存' as traceKind, 'KC' as lx, '科室备货库存' as originBusinessType, null as billNo, gdi.qty as qty, coalesce(gdi.update_time, gdi.create_time) as flowTime, null as warehouseName, fd.name as departmentName, gdi.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, null as orderStatus, case when ifnull(gdi.qty, 0) > 0 then '科室仍有库存' else '科室零库存' end as remark from gz_dep_inventory gdi left join fd_department fd on gdi.department_id = fd.id where gdi.del_flag != 1 and gdi.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and gdi.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} ) trace order by trace.flowTime asc, trace.billNo asc

select di.id as depotInventoryId, di.qty as currentQty, di.batch_no as batchNo, go.order_no as orderNo, di.warehouse_date as warehouseDate, di.update_time as updateTime, w.name as warehouseName, (select sum(ifnull(gzdi.qty, 0)) from gz_dep_inventory gzdi where gzdi.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and gzdi.del_flag != 1 and gzdi.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}) as depInventoryQty, (select group_concat(distinct fd.name separator '、') from gz_dep_inventory gzdi left join fd_department fd on gzdi.department_id = fd.id where gzdi.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and ifnull(gzdi.qty, 0) > 0 and gzdi.del_flag != 1 and gzdi.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}) as depDepartmentName from gz_depot_inventory di left join fd_warehouse w on di.warehouse_id = w.id left join gz_order go on di.order_id = go.id and go.del_flag != 1 where di.del_flag != 1 and di.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and di.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} order by di.id desc limit 1

select traceKind, lx, originBusinessType, billNo, qty, flowTime, warehouseName, departmentName, inHospitalCode, orderStatus, remark from ( select '疑似同批次扣减' as traceKind, 'CK' as lx, '备货出库(未填院内码)' as originBusinessType, gs.shipment_no as billNo, se.qty as qty, coalesce(gs.audit_date, gs.create_time) as flowTime, w.name as warehouseName, d.name as departmentName, se.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, gs.shipment_status as orderStatus, concat('出库明细未指定该院内码，与同批次 ', di.batch_no, ' 相同，可能误扣了 ', di.in_hospital_code) as remark from gz_depot_inventory di inner join gz_shipment_entry se on se.batch_no = di.batch_no and se.material_id = di.material_id and se.del_flag != 1 inner join gz_shipment gs on gs.id = se.paren_id and gs.del_flag != 1 and gs.shipment_status = 2 left join fd_warehouse w on gs.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on gs.department_id = d.id where di.del_flag != 1 and di.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and gs.warehouse_id = di.warehouse_id and gs.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and di.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and (se.in_hospital_code is null or trim(se.in_hospital_code) = '' or se.in_hospital_code != di.in_hospital_code) and coalesce(gs.audit_date, gs.create_time) >= coalesce(di.warehouse_date, di.create_time)
union all
select '疑似同批次扣减' as traceKind, 'TH' as lx, '备货退货(未填院内码)' as originBusinessType, rg.goods_no as billNo, rge.qty as qty, coalesce(rg.audit_date, rg.create_time) as flowTime, w.name as warehouseName, d.name as departmentName, rge.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, rg.goods_status as orderStatus, concat('退货明细未指定该院内码，与同批次 ', di.batch_no, ' 相同，可能误扣了 ', di.in_hospital_code) as remark from gz_depot_inventory di inner join gz_refund_goods_entry rge on rge.batch_no = di.batch_no and rge.material_id = di.material_id and rge.del_flag != 1 inner join gz_refund_goods rg on rg.id = rge.paren_id and rg.del_flag != 1 and rg.goods_status = 2 and rg.goods_no like 'GZTH%' left join fd_warehouse w on rg.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department d on rg.department_id = d.id where di.del_flag != 1 and di.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and rg.warehouse_id = di.warehouse_id and rg.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and di.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and (rge.in_hospital_code is null or trim(rge.in_hospital_code) = '' or rge.in_hospital_code != di.in_hospital_code) and coalesce(rg.audit_date, rg.create_time) >= coalesce(di.warehouse_date, di.create_time)
union all
select '疑似同批次扣减' as traceKind, 'CK' as lx, '仓库流水(未填院内码)' as originBusinessType, wf.bill_no as billNo, wf.qty as qty, wf.flow_time as flowTime, wf.warehouse_name as warehouseName, wf.department_name as departmentName, wf.in_hospital_code as inHospitalCode, null as orderStatus, concat('流水未带院内码，与同批次 ', di.batch_no, ' 相同，可能关联 ', di.in_hospital_code) as remark from gz_depot_inventory di inner join gz_wh_flow wf on wf.batch_no = di.batch_no and wf.lx = 'CK' and (wf.in_hospital_code is null or trim(wf.in_hospital_code) = '') and ifnull(wf.del_flag, 0) = 0 where di.del_flag != 1 and di.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and di.in_hospital_code = #{inHospitalCode} and wf.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (wf.material_id is null or wf.material_id = cast(di.material_id as char)) and wf.flow_time >= coalesce(di.warehouse_date, di.create_time) ) suspect order by suspect.flowTime asc, suspect.billNo asc
